creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 227180
homura-5.5.diff

Hello,

this is an update to 5.5

Changes:

- Homura now uses [wine-proton](https://www.freshports.org/emulators/wine-proton) as default

- Its now possible to switch the wine versin to wine or wine-devel per application.

- Its now possible to choice to kill an entire wineprefix session easily.

- The tinkering section have been removed because it was obsolete.

Thank you in advance!
